purpose: Comparator results consume finite baseline checker artifacts and record bounded discriminator evidence without promoting to theorem status.

results.result_summary: Consumes the A associahedron unit-descent finite artifact and the C cosmohedron move-class/nesting finite artifacts. Records finite evidence that A has one checked local cover mechanism, add one noncrossing diagonal, while C exposes two source-stated local cover mechanisms, delete bracket and contract minimal bracket. This is bounded comparator evidence only.

non_promotion_rule: PASS_PARTIAL_COMPARATOR is finite discriminator evidence within its declared input-artifact scope. It is not theorem status, not all-n, not R13 equality-layer formalization, and not physics or engineering evidence.
